suggestions.title: Deep prop drilling detected
suggestions.description: Props are being passed through multiple component layers to reach their destination. This makes components tightly coupled and hard to refactor.
suggestions.fix: Use React Context for data that many components need (theme, user, settings). For complex state, consider Zustand or Redux Toolkit.

suggestions.title: Overall performance score is low
suggestions.description: Your overall performance score is 0/100. Multiple metrics are underperforming simultaneously. A score below 50 means users are experiencing a noticeably slow and frustrating experience.
suggestions.fix: Review all other suggestions in this report and fix critical issues first. Start with JS errors, then LCP, then React commit durations. Re-run React Doctor after each fix to track your progress.

suggestions.title: Dead code found
suggestions.description: Unused variables or imports were found in your components. These add to your bundle size for no benefit.
suggestions.fix: Remove unused imports and variables. Enable ESLint's no-unused-vars rule to catch these automatically.

suggestions.title: Inline functions found in JSX props
suggestions.description: Inline arrow functions were found directly inside JSX props. Every render creates a brand new function reference, which prevents React.memo() from working correctly on child components and can trigger unnecessary re-renders.
